commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a task-registry exception and regression tests that directly send successful delegated ACP parent-review terminal updates to an explicit Discord channel thread requester origin.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +142. Total +166 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main routes Discord channel/group ACP parent-review terminal completions through the requester-session queue, while docs expect thread-bound ACP output to return to the same thread. I did not run a live Discord reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is human proof handling and maintainer acceptance of the narrow Discord-specific delivery exception; no automated code repair is identified.

target.title: fix(tasks): deliver ACP completions to bound Discord threads
